##NAMES=Aragonite
##RRUFFID=R150021
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca(CO_3_)
##LOCALITY=Gallo river, Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castile-La Mancha, Spain
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Canan D'Avela
##DESCRIPTION=Twinned crystals shaped like hexagonal prisms
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R150021
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ca_0.987_Sr_0.0096_)CO_3_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 4.9612 b: 7.9708 c: 5.7431 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 227.111 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
